scripts.build:worker: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --dry-run --env staging
scripts.cf:types: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- types src/worker/env.d.ts
scripts.cf:types:check: npm run cf:types && git diff --exit-code -- src/worker/env.d.ts
scripts.cf:config:check: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --dry-run --env development && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --dry-run --env staging && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --dry-run --env production
scripts.deploy: echo "Refusing implicit deploy. Use deploy:dev, deploy:staging, or deploy:production." && exit 1
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --env development
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- deploy --env production
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run cf:config:check && npm run cf:types:check
scripts.d1:migration:create: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- d1 migrations create velocity-mvp-dev
scripts.d1:migrate:local: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- d1 migrations apply velocity-mvp-dev --local
scripts.d1:migrate:staging: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- d1 migrations apply velocity-mvp-staging --env staging --remote
scripts.d1:migrate:production: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs npm run wrangler:v4 -- d1 migrations apply velocity-mvp-production --env production --remote
scripts.d1:migrate:runbook: echo "Local: npm run d1:migrate:local | Staging: npm run d1:migrate:staging | Production: npm run d1:migrate:production"
scripts.smoke:staging: test -n "$STAGING_HOST" && curl -fsS "https://$STAGING_HOST/api/health" && curl -fsS "https://$STAGING_HOST/api/leaderboard" && curl -fsS -X POST "https://$STAGING_HOST/api/scan" -H "content-type: application/json" --data "{\"repoUrl\":\"https://github.com/cloudflare/workers-sdk\"}"
scripts.deploy:staging:smoke: npm run deploy:staging && npm run smoke:staging
